title: The Night Train Together
content: A delayed flight forced Mia and Ethan to travel home on an overnight train instead. At first they expected the journey to feel long and exhausting, but the quiet rhythm of the train created the perfect setting for conversation. They spoke about childhood adventures, embarrassing mistakes, and places they still dreamed of visiting. Outside the window, small towns passed silently through the darkness. By sunrise, they had barely slept, yet neither felt tired. The unexpected train ride had given them something much more valuable than a faster trip. It had given them uninterrupted time together.
